positive: A stylized, graphic depiction of a majestic golden retriever puppy playing in a field of bioluminescent wildflowers at sunset. The scene should be rendered in a bold, high-contrast cartoon/vintage illustration style, utilizing limited, cheerful color palettes (teals, mustard yellows, warm oranges). Focus on clean, distinct silhouettes of the dog and flowers, designed for perfect repeat pattern printing. Central composition, dynamic pose, flat graphic shading, crisp lines, studio-quality illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, gradient, messy, muted colors
